results.rendered_html:
dabhīti (wie eben)
1〉 adj. subst. Beschädiger, Feind: yo no durevo vṛkatirdabhītistasminmimāthāmabhibhūtyojaḥ  ṚV. 4,41,4 .
— 2〉 m. N. pr. eines Schützlings der Aśvin  ṚV. 1,112,23  und namentlich des Indra 2,13,9 . 15,5 . 9 . 4,30,21 . dīdayadittubhyaṃ somebhiḥ sunvandabhītiridhmabhṛtiḥ pakthya1rkaiḥ 6,20,13 . tvaṃ śraddhābhirmandasānaḥ somairdabhītaye cumurimindra siṣvap 26,6 . 7,19,4 . 10,113,9 .
— Vgl. a˚.
